data.title: State Of AI Compute, Q2 2026
data.summary: A quarterly synthesis of GPU supply, allocation patterns, and downstream effects on model training cycles.
data.content: Executive summary: GPU availability tightened modestly through the quarter as several hyperscalers shifted allocations toward internal model programs. Section 1 covers supply and capacity additions across major regions. Section 2 examines allocation behaviour observed via signals over the past 12 weeks. Section 3 connects allocation patterns to publicly known training cycles. Section 4 discusses implications for downstream model release cadence and pricing.
